messages.name: fs.read
messages.content: v1 deployment is a local workstation deployment. Default bind is `127.0.0.1`. Host-YOLO makes public deployment unsafe. ```bash cp .env.example .env mkdir -p data/models/lkjai-scratch-60m data/train data/agent data/workspace docker compose --profile inference up --build inference docker compose --profile web up --build web ``` The default artifact root is `data/models/lkjai-scratch-60m/`.

messages.name: fs.read
messages.content: GGUF export is optional future compatibility work. It is not the default serving path for scratch artifacts.
